title: Verify explicit Restatement and difference semantics
preconditions: Retained predecessors cover unchanged inputs, corrected source values, changed provenance with equal outputs, policy changes, deletion, corruption, and incompatibility.
steps: Restate each predecessor; inspect source, policy, metric, state, explanation, and attention differences; retry; exercise No Change and every predecessor failure.
expected: The predecessor never changes; one linked snapshot is created for any changed provenance or content; exact differences are ordered; No Change stores nothing; failures leave history unchanged.
